put.description:
Investor-only. Caps the maximum loss on this follow as a
percentage of the investor's account balance. Idempotent
upsert — calling twice with a different max_loss_pct
overwrites the previous value.
put.summary: [Me] Set or update risk-management on one of my follows

403.description: not the investor of this follow / follow blocked

delete.description:
Investor-only. Removes the cap; the follow continues but
no per-follow loss limit applies. Idempotent — calling
when no settings exist still returns 200.
delete.summary: [Me] Remove risk-management from one of my follows

403.description: not the investor of this follow

get.description:
Investor-only. Returns one row per state-changing call
to /risk (set / update / clear), each tagged with the
investor's account-balance snapshot at the moment of the
change. Newest first.

post.description:
Provisions a new account (trading/demo/ib/mam/investor/wallet/affiliate)
at the provider. Upstream is async — the new account row appears in
GET /integrations/{provider}/accounts only after the provider's queue
finishes processing. Empty body fields fall back to env defaults
split by account_type: live uses DEFAULT_LIVE_ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID /
DEFAULT_LIVE_LEVERAGE; demo uses DEFAULT_DEMO_ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID /
DEFAULT_DEMO_LEVERAGE / DEFAULT_DEMO_BALANCE.
post.summary: Open a new trading account at the provider

400.description: invalid body / unknown provider / invalid account_type

patch.summary: Confirm a deposit as success (client redirect fallback)

post.description: Batman exchanges email/password for a provider JWT, stores ONLY the encrypted token, discards password.
post.summary: Link a provider account (exchange credentials for JWT)

get.summary: Get trader profile + KYC at the provider

post.description:
PCX-style trader registration. Creates a new user at the provider
(no Batman session required) and provisions an initial demo
trading account in one shot. Empty trading_account_type_id /
leverage / amount fall back to env defaults
(DEFAULT_DEMO_ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID, DEFAULT_DEMO_LEVERAGE, DEFAULT_DEMO_BALANCE).
PCX errorCode / errorMessage are propagated as structured 4xx
responses (e.g. email_already_exists → 422).
post.summary: Pre-auth: register a new trader with an initial demo account

400.description: invalid body / unknown provider / missing required field

422.description: provider rejected registration (carries errorCode in Error field)

post.description:
Live counterpart to register-demo. Creates a new user at the
provider (no Batman session required) and provisions an initial
live trading account. Empty trading_account_type_id / leverage
fall back to env defaults (DEFAULT_LIVE_ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID,
DEFAULT_LIVE_LEVERAGE). Optional KYC fields (birth_date / address /
city / state / zip) and agent/affiliate references are forwarded
as-is. PCX errorCode / errorMessage propagate as structured 4xx.
post.summary: Pre-auth: register a new trader with an initial live account

400.description: invalid body / unknown provider / missing required field

422.description: provider rejected registration (carries errorCode in Error field)

post.description:
Creates a user with status `inactive` and sends an email verification link.
Username rules: must match `^[a-z0-9_-]{3,30}$` (lowercase alphanumeric,
dash, underscore). Reserved words rejected (login, register, admin, api,
dashboard, strategies, users, auth, settings, onboarding, me,
forgot-password, reset-password). Username changes are gated by a
5-year cooldown (configurable via USERNAME_CHANGE_COOLDOWN_DAYS).
Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration. If the email exists, a reset link is sent.
Returns a JWT access token. Account must have `active` status and verified email.
Blacklists the current access token in Redis until expiry.

Exchanges a Google Identity Services id_token (JWT) for a Batman
access token. Auto-links by email — an email-registered user
logs in directly. First-time Google users (email belum terdaftar)
get **404** "Account not found. Please register first." (no
auto-create). The response shape matches POST /users/auth/login.
post.summary: Sign in with Google ID token

401.description: invalid or expired Google ID token

404.description: account not found — please register first

post.description: Consumes a single-use code from the forgot-password email.

get.description: Activates the account on success. Code is the token from the verification email.
Listing aman untuk discovery. Email/phone tidak diekspos. Default hanya menampilkan status=active.

patch.description:
Username rules: `^[a-z0-9_-]{3,30}$`, lowercase only, no reserved
words (login, register, admin, api, dashboard, strategies, users,
auth, settings, onboarding, me, forgot-password, reset-password).
Username changes are gated by a **5-year cooldown** (1825 days,
configurable via USERNAME_CHANGE_COOLDOWN_DAYS) — the URL is part
of a money manager's branding and should not change lightly.
The old username is recorded in `username_history` so the public
lookup `GET /users/money-managers/{old_username}` 301-redirects
to the new canonical URL.

get.description:
Returns the public Money Manager catalogue with primary_account,
profile (fees / minimum_start / fee_timing), followers_count and
(when called with a Bearer user token) is_saved.

Case-insensitive lookup. 301-redirects when the username was
renamed (Location header → new canonical URL). Returns 404
when the username is unknown, the user is not a money_manager,
or the account is not active. When the request carries a valid
Bearer user token, `is_saved` reflects whether the caller has
already saved this manager via /me/saved-money-managers.
get.summary: [Public] Get money manager card by username

delete.description: Fails when the user still has active MetaTrader accounts.

account_type.description:
AccountType mirrors the provider's classification (demo / trading
/ ib / mam / etc.). Empty for MT5 rows that do not expose a clean
demo flag. The follow-flow uses it to reject demo accounts; the
future copy-trade engine will gate execution by type.

AccountType mirrors the provider's classification (demo / trading
/ ib / mam / etc.). Empty for MT5 rows that do not expose a clean
demo flag. The follow-flow uses it to reject demo accounts; the
future copy-trade engine will gate execution by type.

risk.description:
Risk is the investor's per-follow risk setting. Populated by the
usecase via a separate enrichment query; nil when the investor has
not configured a limit yet. Carries db:"-" so sqlx ignores it when
scanning the followees table.

ext_merchant.description:
ExtMerchant and ExtendedMerchant are optional sub-merchant routing
hints — pick one of the slugs from Method.ExtendedMethods returned
by GET /deposits/methods (e.g. "pgbox-qr" to deposit via PG Box's
QR variant). Leave empty to use the parent merchant as-is.

integration_id.description:
IntegrationID is required by PCX (`NinjachargeRequest` schema in
docs/pcl.yml). Pick it from Method.Extra.integration_id returned
by GET /deposits/methods. Batman rejects an empty value with 400
before the PCX call so the error surfaces locally.

is_saved.description:
IsSaved is nil when the request is unauthenticated; bool pointer so
JSON `omitempty` drops the field for anonymous callers.

performance.description:
Performance is computed from the primary account's equity snapshot
time-series. Nil when no snapshots exist (e.g. brand-new MM, or one
without a primary account yet).

plan.description: Eager-loaded references. `db:"-"` because they are joined separately.
Eager-loaded references. `db:"-"` because they are joined separately.

country_code.description:
CountryCode is optional. Empty/whitespace is treated as null. When set
it must match an ISO alpha-2 code from /api/v1/countries (case-insensitive).

CountryCode is optional. Empty/whitespace is treated as null. When set
it must match an ISO alpha-2 code from /api/v1/countries (case-insensitive).

CountryCode is optional. Empty/whitespace is treated as null (clears the
field). When set it must match an ISO alpha-2 code from /api/v1/countries
(case-insensitive).

BearerAuth.description: Paste the JWT, or "Bearer " plus JWT (RFC 6750). Swagger Authorize sends this value as the full Authorization header.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
